text.title: Evolutionary Architecture Fitness Functions — Procedure
text.summary: 6-step procedure for one application of `evolutionary-architecture-fitness-functions`. Each step lists input → action → output and an optional decision gate.

step.name: capture-trigger
step.input: Trigger record (event, threshold, schedule) from upstream alerting or planning queue.
step.action: Read the trigger; record `trigger.kind` + `trigger.url`. Reject if vague.
step.decision-gate: If trigger.kind is in {'tbd','soon','when needed'} — abort and route to backlog refinement.

step.name: assign-owner
step.action: Resolve owner to `role:handle`. Confirm availability via the directory, not by guessing.
step.decision-gate: If owner cannot be resolved to a person — abort.

step.name: gather-inputs
step.input: Upstream methodology outputs + ticket bodies + repo state.
step.action: Populate `inputs[]` with name+value pairs. Coerce values to typed primitives where possible.

step.name: draft-decision
step.action: Author a single declarative `decision` sentence. No qualifiers ('we should consider', 'maybe').

step.name: anchor-evidence
step.input: PRs, tickets, dashboards, transcripts that justify the decision.
step.action: Add ≥1 URL to `evidence[]`. For each claim that drives the decision, include at least one anchor.
step.decision-gate: If evidence[] is empty — demote `decision` to a hypothesis and re-queue.

step.name: schedule-review
step.input: Methodology cadence (monthly / quarterly) and the artefact's blast radius.
step.action: Set `review.cadence` + `review.next_review_at`. Commit artefact + open follow-up calendar entry.
step.output: Committed artefact + review entry on owner's calendar.
